title: Resolve Failed Payment
description: Investigate the payment failure, resolve the issue, and confirm readiness to retry

failure_reason.title: Reason for Payment Failure
enumNames: Invalid Bank Account — ACH routing/account number incorrect
Invoice on Hold — finance placed a hold on this payment
Vendor Bank Rejected — receiving bank declined the transfer
Oracle System Error — technical error in payment processing
Blocked Vendor — vendor flagged in Oracle

resolution_action.title: Resolution Action Taken
enumNames: Updated Bank Details — corrected ACH routing/account
Released Hold — hold removed, cleared to pay
Switched to Check — changing payment method to paper check
Corrected Vendor Record — fixed vendor master data in Oracle

resolution_notes.title: Resolution Notes
resolution_notes.description: Describe what was done and who was contacted
